personality_one_liner: A dark, highly vibrant gamified dashboard built specifically for 4-6 year-old kids, focusing on chunky UI, magical glowing elements, and immediate emotional feedback.

spacing.rule: Generous spacing. Pad elements heavily so it's touch-friendly for 4-6 year-olds.

do's: Use blur extensively on bottom tabs, floating modal sheets, and the locked portal overlays
Pair blur with strong neon borders and glowing elements to match the dark theme
dont's: Don't use glass on core buttons (Continue, Play); these should be high-contrast vibrant gradients

screens.name: Splash Screen
screens.purpose: A magical intro featuring Leo to hook the child instantly.

states.loading: Full screen glow loop around Leo

screens.layout: Full-bleed abstract background with the animated Leo character growing from small to large, followed by a confetti burst and tap-nose interaction.

screens.name: Parent Login
screens.purpose: Secure gateway for parents before handing the phone to the child.
screens.layout: Single column. Clean layout over dark background. Top section has logo, middle is the input, and bottom sticky CTA.

screens.name: Child Profile Setup
screens.layout: Large tactile bubbles for age selection. 12 language bhasha selectors in a grid layout (2-col or 3-col based on screen width).

screens.name: Home Screen
screens.purpose: The main hub mapping the child's learning journey and portals.

states.empty: Illustration of sleeping Leo telling to wake up
states.error: Error block with playful 'Oops!' retry button

screens.layout: Dashboard-first approach. Top bar shows XP bar (track rgba(255,255,255,0.1), fill gradient FB923C→EC4899), level title, and streak flame. Below, a 2-col modular grid of 10 portal cards. Cards have dark bg, border rgba(255,255,255,0.07), radius 20px. Free portals feature 'FREE' badge. Locked portals feature 🔒 overlay and 'PAID' badge.

screens.name: Portal Session UI
screens.purpose: The core educational interaction layer with Leo and missions.
screens.layout: Camera/voice input view occupying the main area, with Leo bobbing continuously on the screen. Generous bottom area for mission instructions and high-contrast primary actions.

screens.name: Payment Popup Sheet
screens.purpose: Convert free users to premium when hitting a locked portal.
screens.layout: Bottom sheet modal popping over the home screen. Glassmorphic header, high-contrast typography emphasizing value, and a sticky gradient payment button at the bottom.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the user's color tokens: #08080F for the main background. Use the defined hex codes for accents.
Implement the exact card border style: rgba(255,255,255,0.07) with 20px radius.
Buttons must have a linear-gradient(135deg, primaryColor, darkerShade) with 14px radius.
Ensure the XP bar uses an rgba(255,255,255,0.1) track with a FB923C to EC4899 fill.
Use Fredoka One for headings and Nunito for body copy as mandated.
Ensure touch targets are extra large and well-padded to accommodate 4-6 year-old kids.
Use React Native Reanimated heavily for Leo's 5 emotion states, face bobbing, XP burst, level-ups, and confetti.
Implement the Home Screen portal grid exactly as a 2-column list, incorporating locked overlays (🔒 + PAID) and FREE badges seamlessly.
